zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen於1282年4月15日出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒恭德維爾時，他的父親Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine19歲，母親Isabelle de Rumigny18歲。他於1304年6月與Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年8月23日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年46歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen于1282年4月15日出生在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒恭德維爾时，他的父亲Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine19岁，母亲Isabelle de Rumigny18岁。他于1304年6月与Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年8月23日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年46岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: Herzog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Heinz, Kurt, Otto, Wolfgang, Franz, Arno, Ernst, Hildegarde, Reinhold.

German: from the Middle High German title of nobility herzoge ‘duke’ (Old High German herizoho, from heri ‘army’ + ziohan ‘to lead’, a calque of the Byzantine title stratēlatēs ‘general, commander’, from Greek stratos ‘army’ + elaunein ‘to lead’). The name is unlikely to refer to descent from an actual duke; it is normally an occupational name for the servant of a duke or a nickname for one who put on the airs and graces of a duke. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia (see also 3 below). Compare Hertzog .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Herzog ‘duke’ (see 1 above). Compare Graf and Kaiser .

variants.name: Hartsook
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herceg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Croatian Stanko.

Croatian: nickname from herceg ‘duke’, a title of the medieval feudal lords of Herzegovina (‘duke's land’, a region in Bosnia and Herzegovina), derived from the Hungarian form of German Herzog . Compare Erceg .

variants.name: Herczeg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Imre, Laszlo, Tibor, Attila, Ferenc, Gaza, Istvan, Janos.
Hungarian form of German   Herzog  .

variants.name: Herzig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Fritzi, Hans, Horst, Markus, Monika.
German (eastern and central Germany and Silesia, Switzerland): variant of   Herzog  .
German: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed with hard ‘strong, hardy’, for instance Herto.

variants.name: Hertzog
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Herzog and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Hertzog is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Hartzog
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog   1.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsock
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsoe
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Herzog  .

variants.name: Hartsough
meanings: Americanized form of German   Herzog  .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Frederic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From German. See Friedrich and Frederick .

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen was born on 15 April 1282, in Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, his father, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, was 19 and his mother, Isabelle de Rumigny, was 18. He married Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich in June 1304. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 August 1328, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen est né le 15 avril 1282, à Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Rumigny, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich en juin 1304. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 août 1328, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen am 15. April 1282 in Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine 19 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Rumigny 18. Er hat im Juni 1304 Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. August 1328 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen è nato il il 15 aprile 1282 nel Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Rumigny, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich nel giugno 1304. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1328, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringenが1282年4月15日にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルゴンドレヴィルで生まれた時，父Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraineは19歳，母Isabelle de Rumignyは18歳であった。1304年6月にElisabeth Herzogin von Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年8月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで46歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen(이)가 1282년 4월 15일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 곤드레빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Rumigny(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1304년 6월 Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 8월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

pt.15 avril 1282–23 août 1328: 15 de abril de 1282–23 de agosto de 1328
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen nasceu em 15 de abril de 1282, em Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Rumigny, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich em junho de 1304. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1328, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen родился 15 апреля 1282 г. в местности гондревилл, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Rumigny, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich июнь 1304 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 августа 1328 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.15 avril 1282–23 août 1328: 15 de abril de 1282–23 de agosto de 1328
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frederic IV. Herzog von Lothringen nació el 15 de abril de 1282, en Gondreville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Rumigny, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Herzogin von Österreich en junio de 1304. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1328, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
